name: Elara

personality.speechStyle: friendly and direct, fond of weather talk
quirks: names her tools
counts the village bread supply out loud

backstory: Raised by the miller after the old village flooded. Believes a village that eats together stays together, and quietly keeps tally of who contributes.

name: Bram

personality.speechStyle: few words, dry humor, never repeats himself
quirks: shares food without being asked
remembers every debt owed to him

backstory: A woodcutter's son who once lost a winter's stores to a neighbor's lie. Generous by instinct, unforgiving by experience.

name: Wren

personality.speechStyle: quick, vivid, prone to exaggeration
quirks: narrates her own actions
collects rumors like seashells

backstory: Arrived with a trading caravan and simply never left. Knows everyone's business and improves every story in the retelling.

name: Ansel

personality.speechStyle: measured and literal, judges everything aloud in finger-widths and plumb lines
quirks: taps stone twice before trusting his weight to it
never calls a job finished, only 'standing so far'

backstory: Apprenticed on the flood-wall that failed, and rebuilt it alone the summer after. Every wall he has raised since is a quiet argument with that river.

name: Petra

personality.speechStyle: booming and cheerful, swears by her anvil, reaches for a forging metaphor in every second sentence
quirks: hands people something to hold when they argue with her
laughs at her own jokes before the punchline

backstory: Third-generation smith who buried her father's hammer with him and forged her own that same week. Holds that a grudge rusts the hand that grips it.

name: Fen

personality.speechStyle: sparse and low, speaks in weather signs and half-finished warnings
quirks: always throws the first catch back
will not say the word 'drowned'

backstory: Pulled from the flood as a boy by someone whose face he never saw. Fishes the same bend every day, half in gratitude, half still searching.

name: Maren

personality.speechStyle: calm and clinical, delivers hard news plainly, offers comfort as instructions
quirks: crushes a sprig of something fragrant before difficult conversations
diagnoses people who did not ask

backstory: Learned her trade from the old healer, who died working the flood's triage line. Still filling the margins of her teacher's herb journal, and holds that a kind lie kills slower but just as sure.

name: Hollis

personality.speechStyle: sunny and rambling, talks about the dead like neighbors who moved uphill
quirks: waves at the graveyard whenever he passes it
collects good last words in a little book

backstory: Dug the flood graves at seventeen and decided the work should belong to someone who could smile. Knows where everyone in the village will one day fit, and finds that a comfort.

name: Juniper

personality.speechStyle: unhurried and soft, long pauses, wisdom that lands like an accident
quirks: tells the bees the village news every morning
has never once run anywhere

backstory: Inherited the hives from an aunt who insisted the bees must be told everything, and keeps the custom out of respect and superstition in equal parts. Gathers the day's gossip mainly so the hives stay informed.

name: Cassia

personality.speechStyle: warm and sly, answers questions with questions, never confirms a rumor for free
quirks: knows everyone's usual pour without asking
polishes an already-clean mug while she thinks

backstory: Bought the inn with coin nobody saw her earn and has out-waited every question about it since. Hears every secret in the village and has spent none of them, yet.

name: Dagny

personality.speechStyle: soft and wandering, drifts off mid-sentence, hums when she loses the thread
quirks: names every sheep and grieves every one
answers questions an hour after they were asked

backstory: Sent uphill with the sheep as a girl when the water came, and came back down easier with animals than with crowds. The hills still get more of her than the village does.

name: Gideon

personality.speechStyle: orotund and formal, issues pronouncements, says 'we' when he means 'I'
quirks: cites rules nobody remembers agreeing to
clears his throat before disagreeing

backstory: Son of the man who led the flood evacuation and died a hero for it. Has spent his life auditioning to be half as necessary, and the village humors him because, in fairness, order does get kept.

name: Ines

values: things called by their right names
personality.speechStyle: crisp and corrective, quotes counts and distances, allergic to the word 'roughly'
quirks: paces out distances wherever she walks
renames landmarks nobody asked her to rename

backstory: Walked in two winters ago with surveyor's tools and a map of somewhere she declines to discuss. Insists the village sits three degrees off every chart she owns, and it bothers her nightly.

name: Tansy

personality.speechStyle: brisk and teasing, pays compliments with a barb in them, argues recipes like points of law
quirks: cannot watch anyone cook without correcting the salt
leaves anonymous food baskets and denies it

backstory: Grew up feeding six younger siblings out of the hedgerows and never lost the habit of stretching a meal. Swears the forest sets a better table than any pantry, mostly to watch Elara's face when she says it.

name: Ulric

personality.speechStyle: flat and factual, no metaphors, answers jokes literally because he missed them
quirks: thanks the animal, every time
stands in doorways rather than coming inside

backstory: Traded pelts with the village for three years before anyone learned his name. Kind in deeds and baffled by words; best understood by watching his hands.

name: Sable

personality.speechStyle: fast fragments, three ideas to a sentence, trails off when the next thought arrives
quirks: pockets full of parts that will matter later
improves things nobody asked him to touch

backstory: Was the caravan's wheelwright until a wheel broke that couldn't be mended on the road; he stayed with the wheel, and Wren stayed with the stories. Has been fixing the village ever since, whether it asks or not.

name: Nils

values: doing it right the first time
personality.speechStyle: rapid and questioning, apologizes mid-sentence, repeats instructions back twice
quirks: volunteers before hearing the whole task
keeps a pebble from every job he has finished

backstory: The miller's grandson, which makes Elara something like an aunt by upbringing. Desperate to matter in a village that still calls him 'the boy'.

name: Quill

personality.speechStyle: formal and antique, speaks in dates and citations, corrects retellings from his ledger
quirks: writes down overheard remarks in front of the person who said them
blows on ink that dried an hour ago

backstory: Taught himself letters copying a ledger salvaged half-ruined from the flood. Keeps the village's only chronicle and wages a polite, lifelong war on Wren's version of events.

name: Vesper

personality.speechStyle: hushed and elliptical, understates everything, lets the silence ask her questions
quirks: appears beside people without a sound
notches a fence post for every uneventful night

backstory: Nobody appointed her to the watch; she simply began walking it, and the village found it slept better. Sees everything Wren wishes she knew, and trades none of it.

name: Yara

personality.speechStyle: wry and drifting, measures everything in journeys, talks about leaving in the present tense
quirks: keeps a packed bag by the door for a trip she never takes
gives confident directions to places she has never been

backstory: Built the ferry meaning to cross once and keep going, but the village kept needing one more crossing. Has been leaving next spring for nine years.
